_comment: Provenance for skills-library/backlog. SHAs are the upstream commits the vendored copies were taken from. Every pack vendored here is MIT-licensed and publish-safe (see LICENSES.md). Candidates are public repos worth turning into a skill later.

sources.notes: Plugin format. Also installable directly as a Claude Code plugin if you later want auto-updates instead of this vendored copy.
Broad marketing pack. Several overlap with the live marketing skills; the net-new ones include marketing-plan, prospecting, public-relations, sms.

Standalone 150+ mental-models thinking partner. Bundled as ONE skill: router SKILL.md + references/model-catalog.md + thinking-diagnostics.md, loaded on demand. The model for bundled promotion - one entry, not 150.

candidates.head: a80fa80721a8aebe51a170a7780705024ebc6e46
candidates.notes: macOS app: an on-screen AI teaching buddy that watches your screen, talks back, and points a cursor at UI elements. NOT a Claude Code skill - tracked here as a reference to mine for a future screen-aware teaching / guided-walkthrough skill.

candidates.head: 70231da177abe92ec26375c051561ff9acd8423a
candidates.type: Claude Code workspace (vendorable: 26 skills, 24 commands, 11 agents)
candidates.notes: Claude Code workspace for long-form SEO blog content end to end: research, write, optimize, publish. Net-new value is the SEO commands + agents + data tooling (GA4, Search Console, DataForSEO); the bundled skills largely duplicate the marketing pack.
